top_risks: CLIENT-REJECT (sev 9): The logo file (logo_official) is a 1024x1024 px raster PNG — not a real vector file. The brief explicitly demands the official vector logo for print-ready output, yet no actual .ai/.eps/.svg source has been provided. At 300 dpi print resolution this raster logo will be too small and unusable for a clean SAXOPRINT-ready PDF without retracing, which the brief explicitly forbids.

AGENT CHOKE on 'logo_official': The automated image_crop_and_resize and document_convert_pdf steps require a true vector logo for crisp CMYK print output. A 1024x1024 px raster placed into a 152x214 mm bleed document at 300 dpi yields roughly 86x86 mm at acceptable resolution — borderline — but more critically Adobe Express cannot embed it as a scalable vector, so the PDF/X-4 export will contain a low-quality rasterized logo, failing SAXOPRINT preflight.
